mnemonics.title: PRESENT Structure
mnemonics.content: Problem → Related Work → Experimental Setup → Results → Evaluation → Next Steps → Takeaways

visualTips.visualization: Imagine your thesis as a tree: roots (literature), trunk (methodology), branches (results), fruits (contributions)

analogies.analogy: Like a movie trailer - highlights key scenes (findings), creates interest (implications), leaves audience wanting more (future work)
